scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sleb/shared && npm run build --workspace @sleb/db && npm run build --workspace @sleb/api && npm run build --workspace @sleb/worker && npm run build --workspace @sleb/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @sleb/shared && npm run build --workspace @sleb/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @sleb/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @sleb/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @sleb/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sleb/api && npm run lint --workspace @sleb/worker && npm run lint --workspace @sleb/web
